info.title: Rakuten Web Service API
info.description: Rakuten Web Service provides APIs for searching items, genres, tags, and rankings on Rakuten Ichiba (marketplace), Rakuten Books, Rakuten Travel, Rakuten Recipe, Rakuten Kobo (ebooks), and Rakuten GORA (golf). All APIs use GET requests with App ID authentication.

get.description: Search for items on Rakuten Ichiba marketplace by keyword, item code, shop name, or genre.
Retrieve genre name and genre structure on Rakuten Ichiba by genre ID.
Retrieve tag name and tag structure on Rakuten Ichiba by tag ID.
Retrieve top-selling item rankings on Rakuten Ichiba. Supports filtering by genre, gender, and age.
Search for products by keyword and genre on Rakuten Product.
Search across all Rakuten Books categories.
Search for books on Rakuten Books by title, author, publisher, ISBN.
Search for CDs on Rakuten Books by title, artist.
Search for DVDs and Blu-rays on Rakuten Books.
Search for foreign books on Rakuten Books.
Search for magazines on Rakuten Books.
Search for games on Rakuten Books.
Search for software on Rakuten Books.
Retrieve genre structure for Rakuten Books.
Search hotels by hotel number, coordinates, or division code.
Retrieve detailed hotel information.
Search for available hotel rooms with real-time vacancy.
Retrieve area/district code information.
Search hotels by keyword.
Retrieve hotel chain information.
Retrieve hotel rankings (Overall, Onsen, Luxury).
Retrieve list of recipe categories on Rakuten Recipe.
Retrieve top recipe rankings by category on Rakuten Recipe.
Search for ebooks on Rakuten Kobo.
Retrieve genre structure for Rakuten Kobo.
Search for golf courses on Rakuten GORA by keyword, area, or coordinates.
Retrieve detailed information about a golf course.
Search for golf plans and reservation status on Rakuten GORA.
